name: Tech PM High Earner

demographics.job_title: Product Manager, Senior PM, Director of Product
demographics.location: Urban, tech hubs (SF, NYC, Seattle, Austin)

pain_points: Difficult to track tax deductions for side projects
Tax optimization takes too much time during filing season
Uncertainty about RSU/stock option tax implications
Missing deductions due to lack of awareness
Expensive CPA fees for relatively straightforward situations
goals: Maximize tax efficiency without spending hours researching
Automate deduction tracking throughout the year
Understand tax impact of compensation (equity, bonuses, etc.)
Save money on tax preparation fees
quote: I make good money, but I feel like I'm overpaying on taxes because I don't have time to optimize. I know there are deductions I'm missing, but researching them feels overwhelming.
frustrations: Tax software feels outdated and clunky
CPAs are expensive for what should be straightforward
Don't know what I don't know (missing deductions)
Tax planning is reactive, not proactive
desires: Set it and forget it tax optimization
Integration with payroll and investment accounts
Confidence that I'm not leaving money on the table

willingness_to_pay.value_perception: Pays for itself if it saves more than it costs
